capture_safety_constraints.override_condition: Enable OTEL_LOG_RAW_API_BODIES only with separate explicit authorization and a safely bounded capture procedure.

content_disabled.execution_note: 2026-07-13 re-run with CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY=1 and CLAUDE_CODE_ENHANCED_TELEMETRY_BETA=1 both set; the earlier no-telemetry result was caused by the missing beta trace gate, not by the producer. Evidence: docs/sprints/issue-99-claude-live-validation.md.

tool_error_path.evidence: Operator-authorized 2026-07-13 runs exercised one allowed safe tool call, one deterministic tool failure (claude_code.tool.execution with error status), and one sub-agent delegation; only structural facts were retained.

opaque_trace_reference.evidence: Structural trace telemetry reached the disposable loopback receiver; additional run references are recorded in docs/sprints/issue-99-claude-live-validation.md.

opaque_session_reference.evidence: Every observed span carried a session.id attribute key; the value was intentionally not retained in repository-safe evidence.

supports: claude -p is a distinct non-interactive mode
documented print-mode trace context and span hierarchy
Hook lifecycle and input are producer-defined

blocker.evidence: The original no-telemetry result came from running without CLAUDE_CODE_ENHANCED_TELEMETRY_BETA=1; the 2026-07-13 re-runs with both telemetry gates set emitted structural OTel traces. Hook structure remains uncaptured because no Hook forwarder was configured.
blocker.not_substituted: interactive mode, Agent SDK, Hook structure, or content-enabled synthetic-marker structure

named_follow_up.name: claude-code-print-content-enabled-and-hook-structure-capture
required_preconditions: Claude Code remains installed and authenticated
a disposable local OTLP receiver can capture and reduce producer output to repository-safe structure only
explicit authorization exists for a separate content-enabled synthetic-marker run
a configured Hook forwarder exists for Hook structure capture
required_execution: run a bounded claude -p content-enabled synthetic-marker session with the receiver configured before process start
capture Hook event structure through the configured forwarder
record only emitted names, structural types, occurrence counts, settings labels, opaque references, and deterministic fingerprints
create hooks.structure.json only if real Hook producer records are captured
remove only artifacts created by the follow-up
